creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 204286
Patch

Update ports-mgmt/porttree from 0.9.r94 to 1.0.r102.
Changes
1. Tests added.
2. Installed package name can be used instead of a port.
3. Dependence type code can be colored with -C option.
4. Port cleaned up per discussion in Phabricator, see https://reviews.freebsd.org/D19167 .
